subject: Re: Is this good enough to install and run Warp?
body:
Hi Uhnsoo,

the amount of RAM looks like the only weak spot. I'd make sure it can be 
extended in the future. Otherwise it should be great!

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Monday, November 19, 2018 at 11:13:32 PM UTC+1, uhnsoo@umich.edu wrote:
>
> Hi,
>
> I found a Black Friday deal with the following computer.
> It designed for gaming but can we use it for running Warp too?
> I am willing to sacrifice speed as long as it works.
>
> Best, Uhnsoo  
>
>    - HP Omen By HP Obelisk Desktop - Intel Core i7 - 16GB Memory - NVIDIA 
>    GeForce RTX 2080 - 2TB Hard Drive + 256GB Solid State Drive
>
>
